description: This file is an HTML webpage that provides a user interface for visualizing and browsing databases, tables, and data records. It contains structure, styles, and scripts to dynamically fetch and display database information and records, facilitating exploration of database schemas and contents.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of databases from the server and populates the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the list of databases, resetting the interface.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses a database to show its tables.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches and displays data records for a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Constructs and inserts the HTML table from data.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Generates individual cell HTML, handling long text and objects.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content for detailed viewing.
